FEATURE: Backend leaderboard with anonymous player identity, personal bests, global top 10, shared validation, and game-over UI integration.
REQUIREMENTS: Submit playerId, playerName, and score on game over.
Persist every run and each player's personal best.
Generate anonymous UUID identity once and store it with playerName in localStorage.
Validate player names on the frontend and backend with shared rules.
Accept only non-negative integer scores up to Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER.
Keep score submission non-blocking and show graceful fallback text for fetch failures.
Use existing game menu CSS variables and patterns.

ARCHITECTURE.networkIo: React GameCanvas effects only; Game.ts and systems remain synchronous.
ARCHITECTURE.identity: Client-generated UUID stored as doodle-jump:player-id and display name stored as doodle-jump:player-name.
ARCHITECTURE.validation: shared/leaderboard/schemas.ts for server routes; shared/leaderboard/validation.ts for client UX helpers.
ARCHITECTURE.server: Node http server with node:sqlite to avoid adding dependencies.
ARCHITECTURE.database: players table stores personal bests; score_runs table stores individual runs ranked by score desc and created_at asc.
ARCHITECTURE.frontend: GameCanvas orchestrates submit/fetch; GameMenu remains presentational; PlayerNamePrompt owns name entry.
